summary: Customer Rating System testing complete. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend RatingPrompt component verified on Track Order page - star selector, comment input, submit button, and thank you state all working correctly. One rating per order rule enforced. Comment truncation to 500 chars verified.
seed_data_creation: Used existing completed walk-in orders for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer rating system fully tested. Public endpoints: GET /api/ratings/check (token or order_number+phone), POST /api/ratings/submit. Admin endpoints: GET /api/admin/ratings/summary, GET /api/admin/ratings/unrated-orders, POST /api/admin/ratings/followup/{order_number}, GET /api/admin/ratings/all. RatingPrompt component shows on Track Order page for completed orders. Anti-manipulation: one rating per order, phone validation, 30-min delay for token access (not tested as no tokens generated yet).

details: GET /api/ratings/check with valid order+phone returns eligibility
POST /api/ratings/submit with valid data creates rating
POST /api/ratings/submit duplicate rating rejected (one per order)
GET /api/admin/ratings/unrated-orders returns completed orders without ratings
Follow-up status reflected in unrated-orders response
RatingPrompt component renders for completed orders on Track Order page
5 star selector with hover and click states
Submit button enabled only when rating selected
Success state shows 'Thank you for your feedback!' with filled stars
Error toast shown when order already rated
